text.message: Sorry, it was my best pick. I'm surprised you didn't take 6 9 3
And I think my spot is too weak in general
6 9 3 build to 8 3 is kind of fun
takes 2 whole roads and even then no port
And if I'm tying to port up top that's 3 roads each side, bad for longest road
So I kinda just set myself up to lose
Hmm.  Now that is not good for me
Dunno what to make it it
Out with the old boss in wit the new
I should have asked if this was to plow me lol
Uh oh.  Didn't mean to take road
But he can possibly get it back
i need brick to keep road
That makes it easier for blue
Purple, and chance you'd give a free wood so I can build 1 extra road?
Purple you gotta push for army when possible
Try to connect if u can
Also cause blue keeps road long term if game goes too long
